intro: Xiphopteris punctata, also known as Pteris punctata, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against infections.
